title: Meme Text Art: Copy & Paste Dot Art & Copypasta Memes
meta_description: Meme text art to copy and paste — lenny face packs, table flips, disapproval looks, and original dot art reaction faces. Click any set to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Reaction faces, lenny packs, table flips, and dot art memes built from braille and block characters. Click any piece to copy it instantly.
intro: Meme text art is the reaction-face side of ASCII art: lenny faces, table flips, disapproving stares, and braille dot art faces you paste into Discord, Twitch, and game chats for comedic effect. Unlike decorative text art, these pieces exist to be dropped into a conversation at exactly the right moment. Copy a complete face or flip set below in one click, or grab the shading blocks, braille density characters, and face-building glyphs to assemble your own meme.

sections.label: Shading
sections.intro: The four classic shade levels plus half blocks — the pixels of block-style meme art.

sections.label: Dot Density
sections.intro: Braille patterns ordered from full to sparse — these are the grayscale tones of dot art memes.

sections.label: Face Parts
sections.intro: The borrowed letters and marks that form famous text faces — disapproval eyes, lenny mouths, and rage flips.
